_comment: Illustrative snapshot: both active and archived buckets non-zero. Maps to dashboard token chart + dual-track estimates.

metrics_db_row_patterns.ongoing_snapshot: id: token-{sessionId}-{Date.now()} — from periodic listSessions + tokenUsage
metrics_db_row_patterns.archived_epoch: id: archived-{sessionId}-{resetTimestamp} — from *.jsonl.reset.* last usage line

进行中.estimated_log: from aggregateStaleAndEstimated.estimatedSumActive when stale rows bucket active

归档.estimated_log: estimatedSumArchived when stale rows bucket archived
